name: arguments.len
oneliner: The number of arguments, positional or named.

name: arguments.at
oneliner: Returns the positional argument at the specified index, or the named argument with the specified name.

name: arguments.pos
oneliner: Returns the captured positional arguments as an array.

name: arguments.named
oneliner: Returns the captured named arguments as a dictionary.

name: arguments.filter
oneliner: Produces a new `arguments` with only the arguments for which the value passes the test.

name: arguments.map
oneliner: Produces a new `arguments` by transforming each argument value with the passed function.

name: array
oneliner: Converts a value to an array.

name: array.len
oneliner: The number of values in the array.

name: array.first
oneliner: Returns the first item in the array.

name: array.last
oneliner: Returns the last item in the array.

name: array.at
oneliner: Returns the item at the specified index in the array.

name: array.push
oneliner: Adds a value to the end of the array.

name: array.pop
oneliner: Removes the last item from the array and returns it.

name: array.insert
oneliner: Inserts a value into the array at the specified index, shifting all subsequent elements to the right.

name: array.remove
oneliner: Removes the value at the specified index from the array and return it.

name: array.slice
oneliner: Extracts a subslice of the array.

name: array.contains
oneliner: Whether the array contains the specified value.

name: array.find
oneliner: Searches for an item for which the given function returns `{true}` and returns the first match or `{none}` if there is no match.

name: array.position
oneliner: Searches for an item for which the given function returns `{true}` and returns the index of the first match or `{none}` if there is no match.

name: array.range
oneliner: Create an array consisting of a sequence of numbers.

name: array.filter
oneliner: Produces a new array with only the items from the original one for which the given function returns `{true}`.

name: array.map
oneliner: Produces a new array in which all items from the original one were transformed with the given function.

name: array.enumerate
oneliner: Returns a new array with the values alongside their indices.

name: array.zip
oneliner: Zips the array with other arrays.

name: array.fold
oneliner: Folds all items into a single value using an accumulator function.

name: array.sum
oneliner: Sums all items (works for all types that can be added).

name: array.product
oneliner: Calculates the product of all items (works for all types that can be multiplied).

name: array.any
oneliner: Whether the given function returns `{true}` for any item in the array.

name: array.all
oneliner: Whether the given function returns `{true}` for all items in the array.

name: array.flatten
oneliner: Combine all nested arrays into a single flat one.

name: array.rev
oneliner: Return a new array with the same items, but in reverse order.

name: array.split
oneliner: Split the array at occurrences of the specified value.

name: array.join
oneliner: Combine all items in the array into one.

name: array.intersperse
oneliner: Returns an array with a copy of the separator value placed between adjacent elements.

name: array.chunks
oneliner: Splits an array into non-overlapping chunks, starting at the beginning, ending with a single remainder chunk.

name: array.windows
oneliner: Returns sliding windows of `window-size` elements over an array.

name: array.sorted
oneliner: Return a sorted version of this array, optionally by a given key function.

name: array.dedup
oneliner: Deduplicates all items in the array.

name: array.to-dict
oneliner: Converts an array of pairs into a dictionary.

name: array.reduce
oneliner: Reduces the elements to a single one, by repeatedly applying a reducing operation.

name: assert
oneliner: Ensures that a condition is fulfilled.

name: assert.eq
oneliner: Ensures that two values are equal.

name: assert.ne
oneliner: Ensures that two values are not equal.

name: auto
oneliner: A value that indicates a smart default.

name: bytes.at
oneliner: Returns the byte at the specified index.

name: bytes.slice
oneliner: Extracts a subslice of the bytes.

name: abs
oneliner: Calculates the absolute value of a numeric value.

name: pow
oneliner: Raises a value to some exponent.

name: exp
oneliner: Raises a value to some exponent of e.

name: sqrt
oneliner: Calculates the square root of a number.

name: root
oneliner: Calculates the real nth root of a number.

name: sin
oneliner: Calculates the sine of an angle.

name: cos
oneliner: Calculates the cosine of an angle.

name: tan
oneliner: Calculates the tangent of an angle.

name: asin
oneliner: Calculates the arcsine of a number.

name: acos
oneliner: Calculates the arccosine of a number.

name: atan
oneliner: Calculates the arctangent of a number.

name: atan2
oneliner: Calculates the four-quadrant arctangent of a coordinate.

name: sinh
oneliner: Calculates the hyperbolic sine of a hyperbolic angle.

name: cosh
oneliner: Calculates the hyperbolic cosine of a hyperbolic angle.

name: tanh
oneliner: Calculates the hyperbolic tangent of a hyperbolic angle.

name: asinh
oneliner: Calculates the inverse hyperbolic sine of a number.

name: acosh
oneliner: Calculates the inverse hyperbolic cosine of a number.

name: atanh
oneliner: Calculates the inverse hyperbolic tangent of a number.

name: log
oneliner: Calculates the logarithm of a number.

name: ln
oneliner: Calculates the natural logarithm of a number.

name: erf
oneliner: Applies the error function to a number.

name: fact
oneliner: Calculates the factorial of a number.

name: gcd
oneliner: Calculates the greatest common divisor of two integers.

name: lcm
oneliner: Calculates the least common multiple of two integers.

name: floor
oneliner: Rounds a number down to the nearest integer.

name: ceil
oneliner: Rounds a number up to the nearest integer.

name: trunc
oneliner: Returns the integer part of a number.

name: fract
oneliner: Returns the fractional part of a number.

name: round
oneliner: Rounds a number to the nearest integer.

name: clamp
oneliner: Clamps a number between a minimum and maximum value.

name: min
oneliner: Determines the minimum of a sequence of values.

name: max
oneliner: Determines the maximum of a sequence of values.

name: even
oneliner: Determines whether an integer is even.

name: odd
oneliner: Determines whether an integer is odd.

name: rem
oneliner: Calculates the remainder of two numbers.

name: div-euclid
oneliner: Performs euclidean division of two numbers.

name: rem-euclid
oneliner: This calculates the least nonnegative remainder of a division.

name: quo
oneliner: Calculates the quotient (floored division) of two numbers.

name: norm
oneliner: Calculates the p-norm of a sequence of values.

name: content.has
oneliner: Whether the content has the specified field.

name: content.at
oneliner: Access the specified field on the content.

name: content.fields
oneliner: Returns the fields of this content.

name: datetime
oneliner: Represents a date, a time, or a combination of both.

name: datetime.display
oneliner: Displays the datetime in a specified format.

name: datetime.year
oneliner: The year if it was specified, or `{none}` for times without a date.

name: datetime.month
oneliner: The month if it was specified, or `{none}` for times without a date.

name: datetime.weekday
oneliner: The weekday (counting Monday as 1) or `{none}` for times without a date.

name: datetime.day
oneliner: The day if it was specified, or `{none}` for times without a date.

name: datetime.hour
oneliner: The hour if it was specified, or `{none}` for dates without a time.

name: datetime.minute
oneliner: The minute if it was specified, or `{none}` for dates without a time.

name: datetime.second
oneliner: The second if it was specified, or `{none}` for dates without a time.

name: datetime.ordinal
oneliner: The ordinal (day of the year), or `{none}` for times without a date.

name: dictionary
oneliner: A map from string keys to values.

name: dictionary
oneliner: Converts a value into a dictionary.

name: dictionary.len
oneliner: The number of pairs in the dictionary.

name: dictionary.at
oneliner: Returns the value associated with the specified key in the dictionary.

name: dictionary.insert
oneliner: Inserts a new pair into the dictionary.

name: dictionary.remove
oneliner: Removes a pair from the dictionary by key and return the value.

name: dictionary.keys
oneliner: Returns the keys of the dictionary as an array in insertion order.

name: dictionary.values
oneliner: Returns the values of the dictionary as an array in insertion order.

name: dictionary.pairs
oneliner: Returns the keys and values of the dictionary as an array of pairs.

name: dictionary.filter
oneliner: Produces a new dictionary with only the pairs from the original one for which the given function returns `{true}`.

name: dictionary.map
oneliner: Produces a new dictionary where the keys are the same, but the values are transformed with the given function.

name: duration
oneliner: Represents a positive or negative span of time.

name: eval
oneliner: Evaluates a string as Typst code.

name: float
oneliner: Converts a value to a float.

name: float.is-nan
oneliner: Checks if a float is not a number.

name: float.is-infinite
oneliner: Checks if a float is infinite.

name: float.signum
oneliner: Calculates the sign of a floating point number.

name: function
oneliner: A mapping from argument values to a return value.

name: function.with
oneliner: Returns a new function that has the given arguments pre-applied.

name: function.where
oneliner: Returns a selector that filters for elements belonging to this function whose fields have the values of the given arguments.

name: int
oneliner: Converts a value to an integer.

name: int.signum
oneliner: Calculates the sign of an integer.

name: int.bit-not
oneliner: Calculates the bitwise NOT of an integer.

name: int.bit-and
oneliner: Calculates the bitwise AND between two integers.

name: int.bit-or
oneliner: Calculates the bitwise OR between two integers.

name: int.bit-xor
oneliner: Calculates the bitwise XOR between two integers.

name: int.bit-lshift
oneliner: Shifts the operand's bits to the left by the specified amount.

name: int.bit-rshift
oneliner: Shifts the operand's bits to the right by the specified amount.

name: label
oneliner: Creates a label from a string.

name: module
oneliner: A collection of variables and functions that are commonly related to a single theme.

name: none
oneliner: A value that indicates the absence of any other value.

name: path
oneliner: Creates a path from a string.

name: plugin.transition
oneliner: Calls a plugin function that has side effects and returns a new module with plugin functions that are guaranteed to have observed the results of the mutable call.

name: regex
oneliner: Create a regular expression from a string.

name: repr
oneliner: Returns the string representation of a value.

name: selector
oneliner: A filter for selecting elements within the document.

name: selector
oneliner: Turns a value into a selector.

name: selector.or
oneliner: Selects all elements that match this or any of the other selectors.

name: selector.and
oneliner: Selects all elements that match this and all of the other selectors.

name: selector.before
oneliner: Returns a modified selector that will only match elements that occur before the first match of `end`.

name: selector.after
oneliner: Returns a modified selector that will only match elements that occur after the first match of `start`.

name: str
oneliner: Converts a value to a string.

name: str.len
oneliner: The length of the string in UTF-8 encoded bytes.

name: str.first
oneliner: Extracts the first grapheme cluster of the string.

name: str.last
oneliner: Extracts the last grapheme cluster of the string.

name: str.at
oneliner: Extracts the first grapheme cluster after the specified index.

name: str.slice
oneliner: Extracts a substring of the string.

name: str.clusters
oneliner: Returns the grapheme clusters of the string as an array of substrings.

name: str.codepoints
oneliner: Returns the Unicode codepoints of the string as an array of substrings.

name: str.to-unicode
oneliner: Converts a character into its corresponding code point.

name: str.from-unicode
oneliner: Converts a unicode code point into its corresponding string.

name: str.normalize
oneliner: Normalizes the string to the given Unicode normal form.

name: str.contains
oneliner: Whether the string contains the specified pattern.

name: str.starts-with
oneliner: Whether the string starts with the specified pattern.

name: str.ends-with
oneliner: Whether the string ends with the specified pattern.

name: str.find
oneliner: Searches for the specified pattern in the string and returns the first match as a string or `{none}` if there is no match.

name: str.position
oneliner: Searches for the specified pattern in the string and returns the index of the first match as an integer or `{none}` if there is no match.

name: str.match
oneliner: Searches for the specified pattern in the string and returns a dictionary with details about the first match or `{none}` if there is no match.

name: str.matches
oneliner: Searches for the specified pattern in the string and returns an array of dictionaries with details about all matches.

name: str.replace
oneliner: Replace at most `count` occurrences of the given pattern with a replacement string or function (beginning from the start).

name: str.trim
oneliner: Removes matches of a pattern from one or both sides of the string, once or repeatedly and returns the resulting string.

name: str.split
oneliner: Splits a string at matches of a specified pattern and returns an array of the resulting parts.

name: symbol
oneliner: Create a custom symbol with modifiers.

name: version
oneliner: A version with an arbitrary number of components.

name: version.at
oneliner: Retrieves a component of a version.

name: asset
oneliner: Adds a custom file to a bundle.

name: cite
oneliner: Cite a work from the bibliography.

name: divider
oneliner: A thematic break that separates sections of content.

name: document
oneliner: Manages metadata and is used to add a document file to a bundle.

name: figure
oneliner: A figure with an optional caption.

name: footnote.entry
oneliner: An entry in a footnote list.

name: link
oneliner: Links to a URL or a location in the document.

name: numbering
oneliner: Applies a numbering to a sequence of numbers.

name: outline
oneliner: A table of contents, figures, or other elements.

name: outline.entry
oneliner: Represents an entry line in an outline.

name: par
oneliner: A logical subdivison of textual content.

name: quote
oneliner: Displays a quote alongside an optional attribution.

name: ref
oneliner: A reference to a label or bibliography.

name: strong
oneliner: Strongly emphasizes content by increasing the font weight.

name: table.hline
oneliner: A horizontal line in the table.

name: table.vline
oneliner: A vertical line in the table.

name: terms
oneliner: A list of terms and their descriptions.

name: highlight
oneliner: Highlights text with a background color.

name: lower
oneliner: Converts a string or content to lowercase.

name: raw
oneliner: Raw text with optional syntax highlighting.

name: raw.line
oneliner: A highlighted line of raw text.

name: smartquote
oneliner: A language-aware quote that reacts to its context.

name: text
oneliner: Customizes the look and layout of text in a variety of ways.

name: upper
oneliner: Converts a string or content to uppercase.

name: accent
oneliner: Attaches an accent to a base.

name: scripts
oneliner: Forces a base to display attachments as scripts.

name: limits
oneliner: Forces a base to display attachments as limits.

name: cancel
oneliner: Displays a diagonal line over a part of an equation.

name: class
oneliner: Forced use of a certain math class.

name: mid
oneliner: Scales delimiters vertically to the nearest surrounding `{lr()}` group.

name: abs
oneliner: Takes the absolute value of an expression.

name: norm
oneliner: Takes the norm of an expression.

name: sscript
oneliner: Forced second script style in math.

name: op
oneliner: A text operator in an equation.

name: underbrace
oneliner: A horizontal brace under content, with an optional annotation below.

name: overbrace
oneliner: A horizontal brace over content, with an optional annotation above.

name: underbracket
oneliner: A horizontal bracket under content, with an optional annotation below.

name: overbracket
oneliner: A horizontal bracket over content, with an optional annotation above.

name: underparen
oneliner: A horizontal parenthesis under content, with an optional annotation below.

name: overparen
oneliner: A horizontal parenthesis over content, with an optional annotation above.

name: undershell
oneliner: A horizontal tortoise shell bracket under content, with an optional annotation below.

name: overshell
oneliner: A horizontal tortoise shell bracket over content, with an optional annotation above.

name: bb
oneliner: Blackboard bold (double-struck) font style in math.

name: alignment
oneliner: Where to align something along an axis.

name: alignment.axis
oneliner: The axis this alignment belongs to.

name: box
oneliner: An inline-level container that sizes content.

name: columns
oneliner: Separates a region into multiple equally sized columns.

name: direction
oneliner: The four directions into which content can be laid out.

name: direction.from
oneliner: Returns a direction from a starting point.

name: direction.to
oneliner: Returns a direction from an end point.

name: direction.axis
oneliner: The axis this direction belongs to, either `{"horizontal"}` or `{"vertical"}`.

name: direction.sign
oneliner: The corresponding sign, for use in calculations.

name: direction.start
oneliner: The start point of this direction, as an alignment.

name: direction.end
oneliner: The end point of this direction, as an alignment.

name: fraction
oneliner: Defines how the remaining space in a layout is distributed.

name: grid.hline
oneliner: A horizontal line in the grid.

name: grid.vline
oneliner: A vertical line in the grid.

name: layout
oneliner: Provides access to the current outer container's (or page's, if none) dimensions (width and height).

name: length
oneliner: A size or distance, possibly expressed with contextual units.

name: length.to-absolute
oneliner: Resolve this length to an absolute length.

name: measure
oneliner: Measures the layouted size of content.

name: page
oneliner: Layouts its child onto one or multiple pages.

name: place
oneliner: Places content relatively to its parent container.

name: place.flush
oneliner: Asks the layout algorithm to place pending floating elements before continuing with the content.

name: relative
oneliner: A length in relation to some known length.

name: repeat
oneliner: Repeats content to the available space.

name: h
oneliner: Inserts horizontal spacing into a paragraph.

name: v
oneliner: Inserts vertical spacing into a flow of blocks.

name: stack
oneliner: Arranges content and spacing horizontally or vertically.

name: color
oneliner: A color in a specific color space.

name: color.linear-rgb
oneliner: Create an RGB(A) color with linear luma.

name: color.components
oneliner: Extracts the components of this color.

name: color.space
oneliner: Returns the constructor function for this color's space.

name: color.to-hex
oneliner: Returns the color's RGB(A) hex representation (such as `#ffaa32` or `#020304fe`).

name: color.lighten
oneliner: Lightens a color by a given factor.

name: color.darken
oneliner: Darkens a color by a given factor.

name: color.saturate
oneliner: Increases the saturation of a color by a given factor.

name: color.desaturate
oneliner: Decreases the saturation of a color by a given factor.

name: color.negate
oneliner: Produces the complementary color using a provided color space.

name: color.rotate
oneliner: Rotates the hue of the color by a given angle.

name: color.mix
oneliner: Create a color by mixing two or more colors.

name: color.transparentize
oneliner: Makes a color more transparent by a given factor.

name: color.opacify
oneliner: Makes a color more opaque by a given scale.

name: curve
oneliner: A curve consisting of movements, lines, and Bézier segments.

name: curve.line
oneliner: Adds a straight line from the current point to a following one.

name: curve.quad
oneliner: Adds a quadratic Bézier curve segment from the last point to `end`, using `control` as the control point.

name: curve.cubic
oneliner: Adds a cubic Bézier curve segment from the last point to `end`, using `control-start` and `control-end` as the control points.

name: curve.close
oneliner: Closes the curve by adding a segment from the last point to the start of the curve (or the last preceding `curve.move` point).

name: gradient.linear
oneliner: Creates a new linear gradient, in which colors transition along a straight line.

name: gradient.radial
oneliner: Creates a new radial gradient, in which colors radiate away from an origin.

name: gradient.conic
oneliner: Creates a new conic gradient, in which colors change radially around a center point.

name: gradient.sharp
oneliner: Creates a sharp version of this gradient.

name: gradient.repeat
oneliner: Repeats this gradient a given number of times, optionally mirroring it at every second repetition.

name: gradient.kind
oneliner: Returns the kind of this gradient.

name: gradient.stops
oneliner: Returns the stops of this gradient.

name: gradient.space
oneliner: Returns the mixing space of this gradient.

name: gradient.relative
oneliner: Returns the relative placement of this gradient.

name: gradient.angle
oneliner: Returns the angle of this gradient.

name: gradient.center
oneliner: Returns the center of this gradient.

name: gradient.radius
oneliner: Returns the radius of this gradient.

name: gradient.focal-center
oneliner: Returns the focal-center of this gradient.

name: gradient.focal-radius
oneliner: Returns the focal-radius of this gradient.

name: gradient.sample
oneliner: Sample the gradient at a given position.

name: gradient.samples
oneliner: Samples the gradient at multiple positions at once and returns the results as an array.

name: image.decode
oneliner: Decode a raster or vector graphic from bytes or a string.
deprecated: `image.decode` is deprecated, directly pass bytes to `image` instead

name: line
oneliner: A line from one point to another.

name: polygon.regular
oneliner: A regular polygon, defined by its size and number of vertices.

name: stroke
oneliner: Defines how to draw a line.

name: stroke
oneliner: Converts a value to a stroke or constructs a stroke with the given parameters.

name: counter
oneliner: Counts through pages, elements, and more.

name: counter
oneliner: Create a new counter identified by a key.

name: counter.get
oneliner: Retrieves the value of the counter at the current location.

name: counter.display
oneliner: Displays the value of the counter.

name: counter.at
oneliner: Retrieves the value of the counter at the given location.

name: counter.final
oneliner: Retrieves the value of the counter at the end of the document.

name: counter.step
oneliner: Increases the value of the counter by one.

name: counter.update
oneliner: Updates the value of the counter.

name: here
oneliner: Provides the current location in the document.

name: locate
oneliner: Determines the location of an element in the document.

name: location
oneliner: Identifies an element in the document.

name: location.page
oneliner: Returns the page number for this location.

name: location.position
oneliner: Returns a dictionary with the page number and the x, y position for this location.

name: location.page-numbering

name: metadata

name: state
oneliner: Manages stateful parts of your document.

name: state
oneliner: Create a new state identified by a key.

name: state.get
oneliner: Retrieves the value of the state at the current location.

name: state.at
oneliner: Retrieves the value of the state at the given selector's unique match.

name: state.final
oneliner: Retrieves the value of the state at the end of the document.

name: state.update
oneliner: Updates the value of the state.

name: artifact

oneliner: Explicitly defines a cell as a header cell.

name: elem

name: frame

name: address

name: area

name: base

name: blockquote

name: br

name: colgroup

name: datalist

name: div

name: main

name: optgroup

name: option

name: source

name: tbody

name: tfoot

name: thead

name: time
